themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "The king's statement 'I have dreamed a dream, and my spirit was troubled to know the dream' r...". Word-study detail reinforces "וַתִּפָּ֣עֶם: was troubled - to tap, i.e., beat regularly; hence (generally) to impel or agitate".
